bird.name: 红领啄花鸟
bird.summary: 红领啄花鸟（学名：Dicaeum retrocinctum），是啄花鸟科啄花鸟属的一种，为菲律宾的特有种。全球活动范围约为9,900平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为易危。 红领啄花鸟的平均体重约为6.5克。栖息地包括种植园、亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和耕地。

relations.subject: 红领啄花鸟
relations.evidence: Along with the critically endangered Cebu flowerpecker, it is one of the two threatened flowerpeckers in the Philippines and is declining primarily due to habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 红领啄花鸟
relations.evidence: Forest loss is a threat especially in its lower altitude limits which are more prone to legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmland
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
